entity.label: Beor
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Bela, one of the kings of Edom (Gen. 36:32).

nodes.label: Beor
nodes.description: The father of Bela, one of the kings of Edom (Gen. 36:32).

nodes.label: Bela
nodes.description: The son of Beor, and a king of Edom (Gen. 36:32, 33; 1 Chr. 1:43).

verses.text: And Bela the son of Beor reigned in Edom: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.
Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the children of Israel; Bela the son of Beor: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.
